steps.title: Recognize the parallel structure
steps.content: Both poems serve as examples of ekphrastic poetry — they both explore visual artworks. The transition word must show this parallel relationship.

steps.title: Select the transition for parallel examples
steps.content: Likewise means “in the same way,” which marks Ali's poem as another ekphrastic example. The other three signal contrast or consequence, not parallelism. That matches choice C — C is correct.
